title: At Variance
content:
When with me the play she goes,
    I much admire the buds and bows
    And all that on Kate�s headgear grows.
    But when some other night I see
    That hat between the stage and me,
    My taste and Kate�s do not agree.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Ellis Parker Butler delivers a powerful performance in "At Variance"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
